overall.description: First-person exploration through a concrete drainage channel in a dystopian urban environment. The player moves from under an overpass past piles of trash and wrecked vehicles, then enters a water-filled section of the channel and swims through it. The scene features warm golden hour lighting with atmospheric haze, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's visual style.

events.description: exits the covered area under the concrete overpass into the open channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the concrete drainage channel, emerging from beneath the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure spanning the width of the drainage channel
steep concrete wall of the drainage channel with weathered surface
steep concrete wall on the right side of the channel
large mound of garbage bags and debris accumulated against the left wall
tall metal electrical pylon with multiple cross-arms visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in a drainage channel. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the shadow of the bridge into the open channel, revealing piles of trash against the left wall and a transmission tower in the distance. The concrete walls rise on both sides with warm golden hour light illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with accumulated trash and wrecked vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past extensive piles of trash and abandoned vehicles stacked along the left wall

entered.detail: pile of stacked abandoned vehicles including a blue car and yellow van
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art including green and red designs

segments.scene_description: Moving along the concrete channel, the camera passes large mounds of garbage bags and a stack of wrecked vehicles against the left wall. The wall features prominent graffiti art. The transmission tower remains visible on the right, growing larger as the camera advances through the dry channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete drainage channel approaching water reservoir

events.description: reaches the water-filled section of the channel and steps into the shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking toward the water-filled portion of the channel and entering the water

entered.detail: calm water filling the drainage channel ahead with reflections of the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the trash and wrecked vehicles into an open section of the channel. The transmission tower looms larger on the right. Ahead, the channel becomes filled with water, and the camera approaches and enters the water around the 38-second mark, transitioning from dry concrete to the water-filled section.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded drainage channel with swimming navigation

events.description: dives underwater briefly showing submerged view of the concrete channel
submerges again for a second brief dive underwater

agents.ego_description: swimming through the water-filled channel, periodically diving underwater and resurfacing to explore the environment

entered.detail: reflective water surface showing sky and concrete walls with ripples

segments.scene_description: The camera swims through the water-filled drainage channel, with the water surface reflecting the sky and walls. The transmission tower recedes into the distance on the right. The swimmer dives underwater twice, briefly showing the submerged view of the concrete walls before resurfacing to continue exploring the channel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a concrete drainage channel that transforms from a dry, debris-strewn corridor into a submerged waterway. It begins in the deep shadow of a massive concrete overpass, emerging into the warm golden hour light to reveal piles of trash and a distant transmission tower. As the camera advances, it passes mounds of garbage bags, graffiti-covered walls, and a stack of wrecked vehicles while the tower looms larger on the right. The scene then shifts as the dry concrete gives way to a water-filled section of the channel, where the camera enters the water and begins to swim. Finally, the perspective alternates between the reflective surface of the water and brief underwater dives, showing the submerged concrete walls as the transmission tower recedes into the distance.
